rationale: The GA release source (13be630) is the SAME executable commit v2.0.0-rc.1 was cut from; the RC->GA diff is evidence/docs metadata only, so no executable change ships past the RC. Equivalent beta/RC/production-readiness evidence already exists. The RC soak is a recommendation, not a technical gate: authorize-production-release.sh verify-candidate (the authorization gate) carries no soak gate and is independently READY. soak_complete stays false because the observation window did not elapse; this waiver is the explicit, recorded release-owner override.
